name: Radiant Plateau — Edge District
descriptionSeed: The rim of the Radiant Plateau, where photonic-crystal towers catch and braid the sunlight into working beams. Streets are paved with light-guides; at dusk the whole district glows from below like standing on a slow aurora. The Radiant people prize clarity and revelation — but their light-bending arts mean what you see here is always, deliberately, a choice someone made.
encounterFlavor: Optics-weavers at work, mirror-court politics, filtration array engineers under pressure about the river, apprentices dueling with harmless beams, quiet distrust of Harmonic visitors.
questSeeds: High Luminary Sera needs someone outside her hierarchy to quietly verify which filtration engineer falsified the purity reports — and why
An optics-weaver sells 'memory glass' that replays what light once touched; her latest piece replays something from the night the contamination began
Radiant surveyors mapped a grid of lights in the Disputed Zone at night, then had their charts confiscated by their own council
A Millbrook farmhand accused of stealing a prism-array is being held in the Edge District; the evidence is too neat
axisVectorNote: Derived from authored poleIntensity against world_node_atlas.axisOrder (SNG-180). Disposition — what this place IS. Distinct from world position.
